name: Fresh Pair Goblin
description: Watches new token pairs and launch activity with liquidity, age, volume, holder concentration, creator wallet, and risk-tier filters.
degenPitch: Fresh pairs without raw sewer water. Filter first, ape later if you insist.
whatItDoes: Filters new pairs by liquidity, age, volume, holders, and creator wallet behavior.
Labels token risk tier before alerting.
Gates paid early alerts behind DNA x402 receipts.
cursorPrompt: Build a Fresh Pair Goblin agent using DNA x402. Watch new Solana token pairs, filter by liquidity, age, volume, holder concentration, creator warnings, and risk tier, then receipt-gate paid alerts. No auto-buy.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Fresh Pair Goblin agent using DNA x402. Watch new Solana token pairs, filter by liquidity, age, volume, holder concentration, creator warnings, and risk tier, then receipt-gate paid alerts. No auto-buy.
